ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "disorder_type" INTEGER /* Type of disorder associated with the event */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Primary type of the event */,
  "sub_event_type" INTEGER /* Sub-type of the event */,
  "inter1" INTEGER /* Indicator 1 for event characteristics */,
  "inter2" INTEGER /* Indicator 2 for event characteristics */,
  "iso" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the event occurred */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Country where the event occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the event location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the event location */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities during the event */,
  "nonpolitical" INTEGER /* Indicator if the event is non-political */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event data */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  "event_source_link" TEXT /* Link to the original source of the event data */,
  "data_entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the event data was entered into the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the event data was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in event data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_disorder_type FOREIGN KEY ("disorder_type") REFERENCES disorder_types ("disorder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sub_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("sub_event_type") REFERENCES sub_event_types ("sub_event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disorder_types" (
  "disorder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disorder type */,
  "disorder_name" TEXT /* Name of the disorder type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disorder type */,
  "parent_disorder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent disorder type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disorder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "parent_event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_event_types" (
  "sub_event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-event type */,
  "sub_event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-event type */,
  "parent_sub_event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sub-event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "parent_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality record */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated event */,
  "fatality_count" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident leading to fatalities */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of fatalities by gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an event */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Reference to the event */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the event details at this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Reference to the event */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the event */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant (e.g., individual, group) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Reference to the event */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media item */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the media */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date when the media was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_media_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_media_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
